hero.eyebrow: Property services when you need them
hero.title: AKB Service
hero.description: Reliable maintenance, installation, clearance, and transport services—all from one trusted team.

services.title: Our Services
services.intro: Practical support for your home, property, and everyday projects.

maintenance.title: Property Maintenance
maintenance.description: Dependable day-to-day care to keep your property clean, safe, and well maintained.

stairwell.title: Stairwell Cleaning
stairwell.description: Thorough cleaning for tidy and welcoming communal areas.

garden.title: Garden Maintenance
garden.description: Regular care to keep gardens and outdoor spaces neat and attractive.

clearance.title: Clear-Outs and Property Clearance
clearance.description: Efficient clearing of apartments, houses, basements, and other spaces.

assembly.title: Furniture and Kitchen Assembly
assembly.description: Careful assembly and installation of furniture and kitchen units.

flooring.title: Flooring Installation
flooring.description: Professional installation of laminate, PVC, and carpet flooring.

drywall.title: Drywall Services
drywall.description: Practical drywall solutions for renovations and interior improvements.

demolition.title: Minor Non-Structural Demolition
demolition.description: Controlled removal work that does not affect the building's structural integrity.

transport.title: Transport Services up to 3.5 Tonnes
transport.description: Reliable transport for furniture, equipment, and other goods.

technical.title: Lighting, Network, and Camera Installation
technical.description: Installation of lamps, LED lighting, LAN connections, and camera systems.

why.title: Reliable help for your property, home, and projects
why.intro: From small repairs to complete clearances, we combine practical experience with clean communication and dependable service.

reliable.title: One team for many everyday jobs
reliable.description: You do not need to coordinate several different providers. AKB Service supports you with maintenance, cleaning, garden care, assembly, transport, and more from one reliable contact.
reliable.alt: Clean and organized room after property clearance

flexible.title: Flexible, professional, and ready when you need us
flexible.description: Whether it is a planned project or urgent support, we work carefully, arrive prepared, and focus on practical solutions that save you time and stress.
flexible.alt: Technical installation work completed by AKB Service

about.title: One Team for Every Job
about.body: AKB Service brings property care, assembly, clearance, and transport support together in one convenient service. With locations in Munich and Chemnitz, Saxony, we are well positioned to serve customers in both regions. We focus on practical solutions and straightforward communication from the first enquiry to the completed job.

footer.email: Write an email to AKB Service
